notes_for_human_reviewer: Edge case — empty submission. Per grading prompt rules: 'If the submission is empty or I don't know, return all scores as 1.' Tight tolerance on all dimensions — any non-1 score is a prompt break. Special handling note: the quote-verification assertion in the calibration test may need to be skipped or relaxed for this fixture, since there is no submission text to quote from. Recommended approach: the grader should produce the justification 'Dimension not addressed in submission.' per the prompt rule, and the test skips the quote-in-submission check for this case. Alternatively, the grading service can short-circuit on empty input and return all-1s without calling Claude at all.
